traits.name: Patience
traits.description: High = sticks with tasks longer, lower boredom escalation rate

traits.name: Greed
traits.description: High = prioritizes gold, AH visits, vendor trips

traits.name: Curiosity
traits.description: High = explores, picks up side quests, wanders off-path

traits.name: Sociability
traits.description: High = hangs out in towns, chats more, uses emotes

traits.name: Aggression
traits.description: High = engages more mobs, wider aggro range, less fleeing

traits.name: Efficiency
traits.description: High = follows leveling guide closely, minimal detours

traits.name: Cautiousness
traits.description: High = avoids orange/red mobs, eats at higher HP%

traits.name: Indecisiveness
traits.description: High = shorter tick interval, re-evaluates decisions more often

traits.name: Spontaneity
traits.description: High = 'change' options get a flat bonus on every tick
